_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for product identity AND launch configuration. Renaming or changing distribution = editing this file. Do NOT hardcode these values anywhere else. 'Motiq' is the chosen product name and registry namespace (motiq.dev, @motiq); a full trademark/name-availability clearance has not yet been performed. This project is distributed as a FREE, OPEN-SOURCE catalog (reactbits.dev-style): the entire catalog is public and installable, with no pricing, checkout, or gating. `registryBaseUrl`/`documentationUrl` must point at the deployed domain (a Vercel custom domain, or the <project>.vercel.app subdomain).
description: Beautiful, production-ready animated React and shadcn components you install as editable source.
tagline: Animated React & shadcn components, installable as editable source.

commerce._comment: Free/open distribution. The whole catalog is public and installable — no pricing, checkout, waitlist, or private registry. CTAs collapse to 'Explore the catalog' / install-free (see apps/docs/lib/commerce.ts). launchMode `launched` with checkoutEnabled=false is the free/open launch recognized by scripts/check-launch-config.mjs. Legal/commerce fields are retained but inert; a future paid tier would re-enable the relevant flags.
